'''''Star Wars: Empire: "General" Skywalker''''' was the eighth story arc in the [[Star Wars comic books|comic book]] series ''[[Star Wars: Empire]]''. It consisted of issues 26-27. The story is set 7 months ABY.

==Plot summary==
[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke]] and [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge]] become stranded on the ground during a recon mission and discover an unlikely ally - a [[Clone trooper/Legends|Clone Trooper]] named Able who was marooned after his Old Republic dropship crashed there during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]] while in the service of Jedi Master [[Shaak Ti/Legends|Shaak Ti]] and thus never given [[Order 66/Legends|Order 66]]. In order to outfight the Empire again, Luke must do what [[Obi-Wan Kenobi/Legends|Obi-Wan]] and other Jedi Masters once did during the Clone Wars - prove himself both as a Jedi and as a General. Furthermore, the Old Republic Clone Trooper finds himself in a fight against his successor - the Imperial [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] - for the very first time.{{Plot}}
